title: red cpvp 16x
description: A red CPVP pack 16x for better looks
body:
**A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a red color and gives them a brand new look the Pack contains Following things:**
- Crossbow
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Axe
- Mace
- low fire
- small totem
- no explosion particles
- Obsidian
- End crystal item
- End crystal entity
- respawn anchor
- Cobwebs
